highlights.text_en: Open to work: AI Product Manager | Pre-Sales Solutions Architect
highlights.text_zh: 求职意向：AI产品经理 | 售前解决方案架构师

highlights.text_en: AI Courses: AI Technology Course (Nov 2025–Present), AI Product Manager Course (Jan 2026–Present)
highlights.text_zh: AI进阶：人工智能技术课程（2025.11至今）、AI产品经理课程（2026.01至今）

highlights.text_en: AI Certifications: Alibaba Cloud ACP Senior LLM Engineer ✅, Deep Learning Architect ✅, LLM Application Development Engineer ✅
highlights.text_zh: AI认证：阿里云大模型高级工程师ACP ✅、深度学习架构师 ✅、大模型应用开发工程师 ✅

highlights.text_en: Learning cutting-edge AI technologies, exploring and developing AI products, content creator on WeChat Official Account
highlights.text_zh: AI实践：学习AI前沿技术，探索和开发AI产品，运营微信公众号持续内容创作

items.company_zh: SAS · 赛仕软件（北京）有限公司
items.role_zh: 销售部 · 数据分析顾问

highlights.text_en: Pre-sales Solutions: JMP data analysis consultant for North China territory, identified pain points in R&D, process and quality for semiconductor and automotive clients, translated business requirements into actionable Data+AI solutions.
highlights.text_zh: 售前解决方案：担任JMP软件华北区数据分析顾问，精准识别半导体和汽车等制造业客户研发、工艺和质量环节痛点，将业务需求转化为可落地的数据分析与AI赋能解决方案。

highlights.text_en: Product Demo: Managed end-to-end engagement from requirements analysis to POC validation, facilitated strategic clients' digital transformation and secured million-RMB-level orders.
highlights.text_zh: 产品演示交流：从需求沟通到POC验证全程跟进，主导关键商机的产品演示，助力战略客户数字化转型，赢得百万级订单。

highlights.text_en: Marketing: Designed and delivered Webinars, White Papers, averaging 1,000+ registrations per webinar, set annual record for most popular webinar with 1,600+ registrations.
highlights.text_zh: 市场活动赋能：设计并交付直播课与白皮书，平均注册超1000人，创年度最受欢迎直播课记录，单场报名1600+人。

highlights.text_en: AI Product Dev: Led AI-powered JMP Statistical Analysis Report Assistant Add-In development, integrated LLM visual understanding and report interpretation.
highlights.text_zh: AI产品开发：主导AI驱动的JMP统计分析报告助手插件开发，集成大模型视觉理解与报告解读能力。

items.company_zh: 北京星网宇达科技股份有限公司

highlights.text_en: Product R&D: Led product metric improvement and new-product system design, applied simulation and data analysis to predict key metrics, worked cross-functionally to identify and optimize key factors, brought core metrics to domestic leading level.
highlights.text_zh: 产品研发：主导产品指标优化与新产品开发总体方案设计，创新性应用仿真计算与数据分析预测核心指标，跨部门协作识别和优化关键影响因子，将核心指标提升至国内领先水平。

highlights.text_en: Project Bidding: Led technical proposal outline and content development for bidding, contributed to 5+ successful project bidding wins worth multimillion-RMB.
highlights.text_zh: 项目投标：主导投标书技术方案大纲制定和编写，助力5+个千万级项目成功中标。

highlights.text_en: Awards: Excellent Employee, Technology Innovation Prize, Excellent Manager.
highlights.text_zh: 荣誉奖项：优秀员工、技术创新奖、优秀部门经理。

items.role_zh: 工学硕士 · 材料科学与工程
工学学士 · 材料科学与工程
